mapper.insert: INSERT INTO jsh_freight_statement (statement_no, carrier_id, begin_time, end_time, total_weight, total_freight, paid_amount, status, sign_status, attachment, remark, delete_flag, create_time, creator) VALUES (#{statementNo}, #{carrierId}, #{beginTime}, #{endTime}, #{totalWeight}, #{totalFreight}, #{paidAmount}, #{status}, #{signStatus}, #{attachment}, #{remark}, #{deleteFlag}, #{createTime}, #{creator})
mapper.select: SELECT id, statement_no as statementNo, carrier_id as carrierId, begin_time as beginTime, end_time as endTime, total_weight as totalWeight, total_freight as totalFreight, ifnull(paid_amount,0) as paidAmount, status, sign_status as signStatus, attachment, remark, delete_flag as deleteFlag, create_time as createTime, creator FROM jsh_freight_statement WHERE id=#{id} AND ifnull(delete_flag,'0') != '1'
SELECT count(1) FROM jsh_freight_statement WHERE statement_no LIKE concat('WDZ', #{datePrefix}, '%')

SELECT fh.id, fh.bill_no as billNo, DATE_FORMAT(fh.bill_time,'%Y-%m-%d') as billTime, fc.name as carrierName, fh.total_weight as totalWeight, fh.unit_price as unitPrice, fh.total_freight as totalFreight, fh.remark
ORDER BY fh.bill_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{rows}

SELECT fh.id, fh.bill_no as billNo, DATE_FORMAT(fh.bill_time,'%Y-%m-%d') as billTime, fc.name as carrierName, fh.total_weight as totalWeight, fh.unit_price as unitPrice, fh.total_freight as totalFreight, fh.remark FROM jsh_freight_statement_item fsi JOIN jsh_freight_head fh ON fh.id = fsi.freight_head_id AND ifnull(fh.delete_flag,'0') != '1' LEFT JOIN jsh_freight_carrier fc ON fc.id = fh.carrier_id WHERE fsi.statement_id = #{statementId} AND ifnull(fsi.delete_flag,'0') != '1' ORDER BY fh.bill_time
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO jsh_freight_statement_item (statement_id, freight_head_id, delete_flag) VALUES
(#{statementId}, #{fhId}, '0')
mapper.update: UPDATE jsh_freight_statement_item SET delete_flag = '1' WHERE statement_id = #{statementId}
UPDATE jsh_freight_statement SET paid_amount = ifnull(paid_amount,0) + #{amount} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT di.id, dh.number as billNo, s.supplier as customerName, s.project_name as projectName, m.name as brand, m.model, m.standard, m.weight as unitWeight, di.oper_number as operNumber, di.weight as itemWeight FROM jsh_freight_item fi JOIN jsh_depot_head dh ON dh.id = fi.depot_head_id AND ifnull(dh.delete_flag,'0') != '1' JOIN jsh_depot_item di ON di.header_id = dh.id AND ifnull(di.delete_flag,'0') != '1' JOIN jsh_material m ON m.id = di.material_id LEFT JOIN jsh_supplier s ON s.id = dh.organ_id WHERE fi.header_id = #{freightHeadId} AND ifnull(fi.delete_flag,'0') != '1' ORDER BY dh.number, di.id
